metadata.title: Quick Double Kill from a Sharp Angle in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Came around an unexpected corner and found two enemies unprepared. Sometimes all it takes is timing and a steady hand. What’s your favorite angle to hold in VALORANT?

Share your best angle plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Share your best angle plays in the comments!
